{{Quote|Nonsense. My grandchildren's grandchildren could never live long enough to repay you.|Spero to Princess [[Leia Organa Solo/Legends|Leia Organa]]|<ref name="Shadows of the Empire (novel)">[[Star Wars: Shadows of the Empire (novel)|''Star Wars: Shadows of the Empire'' novel]]</ref>}}
'''Spero''' was a [[Gender/Legends|male]] [[Ho'Din/Legends|Ho'Din]] who lived in the [[Southern Underground/Legends|Southern Underground]] on [[Coruscant/Legends|Coruscant]]. 

His life and that of his family was saved by [[Leia Organa Solo/Legends|Leia Organa]] prior to [[3 ABY/Legends|3.5 ABY]]. 

During his stay in the Southern Underground he operated a [[Spero's plant shop|plant shop]]. He developed connections throughout both the [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Empire]], the [[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Rebels]] and to criminal figures, becoming famous to [[smuggler/Legends|smugglers]] such as [[Lando Calrissian/Legends|Lando Calrissian]] and [[Dash Rendar/Legends|Dash Rendar]].

He was a [[Master Gardener]], a title he earned after creating a strain of yellow fungus that were eventually used all over [[The galaxy/Legends|the galaxy]].<ref name="The Secrets of Star Wars: Shadows of the Empire">''[[The Secrets of Star Wars: Shadows of the Empire]]''</ref> He also grew [[feather tree]]s in his shop.<ref name="SEnovel">[[Star Wars: Shadows of the Empire (novel)|''Star Wars: Shadows of the Empire'' novel]]</ref> 

One time Leia, disguised as [[Boushh/Legends|Boushh]], came to his shop to "collect" the debt to Leia. The faceless [[bounty hunter/Legends|bounty hunter]] needed information on the [[Black Sun/Legends|Black Sun]], and Spero said what he knew: it was led by the all-powerful [[Falleen/Legends|Falleen]] Underlord [[Xizor/Legends|Xizor]], also owner of [[Xizor Transport Systems]]. He also added that [[Xizor's Palace|his palace]] extended deep into the planet's ground. This confirmed Leia's suspicions, and told him that his debt was paid. Spero, who understood who she was actually, said that his debt to her was much bigger.<ref name="SEnovel" /><ref name="Card-Topps-Leia Visits Spero's Plant Shop">{{Topps|set=1996 Topps Star Wars: Shadows of the Empire|cardname=Leia Visits Spero's Plant Shop|link=https://www.rebelscum.com/photo.asp?image=/sote/soteTC041.jpg}}</ref>

Later [[Lando Calrissian/Legends|Lando Calrissian]] and [[Luke Skywalker/Legends|Luke Skywalker]] would come to him for aid, only to find him tied up in his shop. They were attacked by men from [[Black Sun/Legends|Black Sun]] and were rescued by [[Dash Rendar/Legends|Dash Rendar]], though Spero was left behind with an apology.<ref name="SEnovel" /><ref name="Card-Topps-Dash Does it Again">{{Topps|set=1996 Topps Star Wars: Shadows of the Empire|cardname=Dash Does it Again|link=https://www.rebelscum.com/photo.asp?image=/sote/soteTC053.jpg}}</ref>
